generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mother and a patriot, I've always believed in doing our part for national security. The current debate about conscription isn't just about policy—it's about our collective duty. Did you know that countries with mandatory service actually have lower rates of youth crime and higher civic engagement? It's not just about defense; it's about building a stronger, more responsible society. Our allies in Europe have shown that when everyone contributes, we all benefit. Let's not let fear of inconvenience overshadow the greater good. #NationalService #CivicDuty
